privacy.metaDescription: ResumeBoost privacy policy and data handling practices
privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.dataWeCollectIntro: We collect the following information when you use ResumeBoost:

dataItems.resume: Resume files you upload for analysis

privacy.howWeUseDataText: Your data is used to provide AI-powered resume analysis, generate improvement recommendations, and facilitate expert consultations. We do not sell your personal data.

rights.access: Access — Export all your data at any time
rights.erasure: Erasure — Request permanent deletion of all your data
rights.portability: Portability — Download your data in a machine-readable format

privacy.exerciseRights: To exercise these rights, visit your account settings or contact us.
privacy.cookiesText: We use necessary cookies for authentication and site functionality. Optional analytics cookies are only set with your explicit consent. You can manage your cookie preferences at any time using the cookie settings.
privacy.dataSecurityText: All data is encrypted in transit (TLS) and at rest. Passwords are securely hashed. Files are stored in encrypted cloud storage (AWS S3 with server-side encryption).
privacy.contactText: For privacy-related inquiries, please contact us at

errors.unexpectedError: An unexpected error occurred. Our team has been notified and is working on a fix.
errors.pageNotFoundDescription: The page you are looking for does not exist or has been moved.
errors.featureError: We encountered an issue with {feature}. Please try again.
errors.genericError: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again or refresh the page.

cookies.message: We use cookies to improve your experience. Necessary cookies are always active. You can choose which optional cookies to allow.
cookies.necessaryDescription: Required for the site to function. Cannot be disabled.
cookies.analyticsDescription: Help us understand how you use the site.

home.featureExpertDescription: Connect with professionals for personalized career guidance.
